title: rubus schleicheri var. torrentium
intro: Rubus schleicheri var. torrentium, also known as the Water Raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus schleicheri plant, belonging to the Rosaceae family, and is a type of thorny, deciduous shrub native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its astringent and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rubus schleicheri var. torrentium include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues and skin problems.
